title: elaphoglossum gorgoneum
intro: Elaphoglossum gorgoneum, also known as the Gorgoneum fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been linked to several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Elaphoglossum gorgoneum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cases, it is used in herbal remedies for its potential benefits to the digestive system.
